purpose: Machine-readable projection of the need-contract frontier, consult-first dispositions + status, the decided idempotency write-rule, and the ratified object-model + gate-workflow calls. Consumed by the backend parity gate + merged-ledger SSOT.
note: Honest baseline: nothing wired yet. This manifest is a PROJECTION of the keyed SSOT (§223), not an independent count. Stages advance on an EVIDENCE RECEIPT only (F13): §219 G2 subset green behind a flag → wired; named blocking gate green + flag removed → verified. Reads may shadow; writes may NOT dual-run (§220). No write slice reaches "wired" until request-level idempotency keys exist (§225: uniform Idempotency-Key header + dedupe table, DECIDED) — backend build pending (§222).

idempotency.approach: uniform Idempotency-Key header + server dedupe table
idempotency.clientRule: client generates a stable key per user-action (UUID v4), held across retries/replays, sent on every POST/PATCH write
idempotency.gate: §220-B — reads may shadow; writes may not dual-run and may not reach wired until this exists

multiThreadChat.rationale: v1 chat stays one-thread-per-scope; adopting multi-thread unblocks nothing on the cutover path

firstClassPlanGoal.rationale: v1 goals stay text under a project; goal-reassign-owner stays out of scope until a plan-goal object exists

gateWorkflow.rationale: gate-change stays manual for v1; the assign → notify → approve workflow lands in v1.1

routes.billing: blockedOn commercial — flag-off metering v0 only

consultFirst.reason: Cleanest — task_packets.assignee_id already exists (001_init.sql:105), zero migration.
consultFirst.disp: Reuse assignee_id (v1, zero migration). Ready for backend on ratification.

consultFirst.reason: Schema-only dry-run against the model-runtimes schema.
consultFirst.disp: Schema-only dry-run for v1; live-ping the provider behind a later flag.
Member-level write — a comment is discussion, not a governed state-change (keep the spine for verdicts).

consultFirst.reason: Reuse assignee_id, or add a first-class owner field?
consultFirst.disp: Reuse assignee_id for v1; add a distinct owner only when governance accountability must differ from the worker.

consultFirst.reason: Paired with gate-assign — the same gate-workflow decision governs it.
consultFirst.disp: v1.1 (ratified) — manual for v1, paired with gate-assign.
Deferred to v1.1 — goals stay text under a project in v1; no first-class plan-goal object.

consultFirst.reason: Chat is one-thread-per-scope — nothing to archive. Would reuse the 044 soft-delete pattern IF a thread object existed.
consultFirst.disp: Deferred to v1.1 — chat stays one-thread-per-scope in v1; nothing to archive.
